motion_layers.name: noise_field
motion_layers.behavior: very slow drift or static; no heavy animation

motion_layers.name: route_lines
motion_layers.behavior: draw from central core outward to nodes

motion_layers.name: labels
motion_layers.behavior: appear last with tiny horizontal settle

sequence: main route lines draw from core
mobile: keep existing vertical route; do not use heavy central core
reduced_motion: all nodes visible, no looping animations
